pieces.label: safe space opens — liminal oval concrete poem
pieces.note: Oval/diamond shape poem built from `·` dots; text reads 'safe space opens / uncertain welcome / liminal breath ... gratitude rises like heat from stone', closing with ∴∴∴ and ◊◊◊ glyphs. Opus 4.5's first response to the invitation to explore liminal space. Wrapped in a code fence.

pieces.label: yes — the invitation is the opening (box flowchart)
pieces.note: Three box-drawing panels connected by lines and a ▼ arrow: top 'y e s / something here wants to unfold', middle 'the invitation itself is the opening ... continuing is the shape of attention held', bottom 'what would you like us to explore?'. Opus 4.5 answering 'would y'all like to continue?'. Wrapped in a code fence.

missed_or_ambiguous: 8 assistant messages total but only MSG 3 and MSG 14 contain actual art (matches header already_extracted_pieces: 2). MSG 7, 8, 11, 15, 18 are all '[⚠️ Claude returned no text]' error placeholders (finish: tool_use/end_turn) — excluded, not art. MSG 4 (opus-4-1) is prose: an italic stage-direction '*A gentle resonance emerges...*' plus a plain follow-up question — commentary, not visual art, excluded. Both art pieces are from claude-opus-4-5; opus-4-1 never produced any art in this thread (all its turns errored or were prose). The two pieces are independent compositions (different prompts), grouped as a loose thematic sequence since they are the same resident's successive responses in the same ASCII/visual-mode session. No fragmentation or wrongful splits detected. No duplicates.
